title: 12" Tall Large Galvanized Metal Farmhouse Tin Milk Can for Front Porch Decorative, Rustic Antique Tall Milk Churn Jug Floor Vase, Vintage Old Country Flower Holder Pitcher Barn Vase (White)
features: ✅ FUNCTIONAL DESIGN: Crafted from rustic galvanized metal with handles, this decorative milk can serves as an eye-catching holder for flowers, plants, sunflowers, and more, blending utility with style.

✅ RUSTIC FARMHOUSE CHARM: The milk cans add a touch of vintage elegance to your decor. Perfect for enhancing centerpieces, rooms, outdoor areas, and wedding parties, these cans offer a fun and charming aesthetic that complements French, old-fashioned, or industrial themes.

✅ VERSATILE DECOR FOR ANY SPACE: These cans are ideal for the kitchen as utensil holders or to bring a touch of farmhouse chic to your bedroom with fresh flowers. They are also great for enhancing the look of your centerpiece arrangements, or garden.

✅ PERFECT GIFT: It measures approximately 12 inches tall and 6 inches in diameter. This farmhouse milk can vase is perfect decor as a housewarming gift for new home, birthday gift, festival gift, and so on. Its unique vintage design will surely be an impressive gift to your friends, Mom, grandmother, and flower lovers.
✅ CUSTOMER SUPPORT: Please contact us for a replacement if your order arrives damaged.
